title: Critoniopsis solorzanoana

It belongs to the tribe Senecioneae, which is a group of plants that are typically found in the tropical regions of the Americas. Critoniopsis solorzanoana is further classified into the genus Critoniopsis, which is a group of flowering plants that are native to the Andes mountains. The classification of Critoniopsis solorzanoana is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf shape and flower structure. This classification helps in understanding the evolutionary relationships among different species of Critoniopsis.
